landing.title: CertiPractice
landing.subtitle: Prepare your certification with thousands of real questions
landing.backendError: Backend unavailable. Make sure the server is running on port 3000.
landing.noProviders: No providers found in the database.
landing.noFailedQuestions: You have no failed questions available
landing.chooseProvider: Choose the provider and certification. Questions come directly from the PostgreSQL database.
landing.progressAutoSaved: Your progress will be saved automatically.
landing.freeDesc: You can take full exams without creating an account.
landing.registerCTA: Want more? Register to save your progress, view detailed statistics and full history.
landing.guestModeInfo: Your exam will be saved temporarily for this session.
landing.registerForProgress: Want to save your progress permanently? Register here
landing.joinCommunity: Don't have an account? Join the community
landing.unsureDesc: If it's your first time, we recommend starting with Practice Mode to get familiar with the question format. Use Real Exam Mode to evaluate your knowledge.
landing.alsoFailedMode: You can also use Failed Questions to improve your specific weaknesses.
landing.solutionStart: Start the backend: npm run dev
landing.failedHint: Practice only the questions you have answered incorrectly
landing.failedModePromo: unlock "Failed Questions" mode to practice only what you need to improve
landing.runSampleData: Run the sample data script to get started.

auth.switchToRegister: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.switchToLogin: Already have an account? Log in
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

exam.title: Exam
exam.question: Question
exam.confirmFinishText: Are you sure you want to finish the exam?
exam.selectMore: Select {{count}} more answer(s) to complete this question.
exam.timeLow: Less than 5 minutes left. The exam will be submitted automatically when time runs out.
exam.realisticWarning: Real Exam Mode: Answer verification and pauses are not available. Full concentration until the end.
exam.failedModeInfo: Failed Questions Mode: You answered this question incorrectly before. Focus on understanding the explanation to improve.
exam.answerIncorrect: Incorrect. Your answer is not correct.
exam.pausedText: Your exam is paused. Time is not running.
exam.fillBlankHint: Write the correct answer(s) in the fields.
exam.dragHint: Drag the items to arrange them in the correct order.

realistic.name: Real Exam Test
realistic.description: Realistic simulation of the official exam
restrictions: Categories and difficulty are not shown
Once started, it must be completed

practice.name: Practice Mode
restrictions: Does not simulate real exam conditions

failed_questions.name: Failed Questions
failed_questions.description: Practice only with questions you have failed before
restrictions: You need to have failed questions previously

modeSelector.heading: How do you want to take your exam?
modeSelector.subheading: Choose the mode that best fits your goals. You can practice with aids, do a realistic simulation of the official exam, or focus on questions you've failed.
modeSelector.failedModeDesc: This exam will include only the {{count}} questions you have answered incorrectly at least once.
failedModeTips: Focus on your areas for improvement
modeSelector.guestDesc: Without an account, your progress will only be saved for this session. To save permanently and resume exams,
modeSelector.needMoreFailedDesc: You need at least 5 incorrectly answered questions to use this mode. You currently have {{count}} failed questions.
modeSelector.needMoreFailedHint: Complete some exams in practice mode to build your failed questions bank.
modeSelector.tipDesc: If it's your first time, we recommend starting with Practice Mode to get familiar with the question format. Register to unlock the failed questions mode.
modeSelector.tipDesc2: If it's your first time, we recommend starting with Practice Mode to get familiar with the question format. Register to unlock the failed questions mode.

exitModal.title: Exit the exam?
exitModal.saveAndExitDesc: Save your progress and exit. You can resume the exam later.
exitModal.exitWithoutSavingDesc: Exit and lose the current exam progress.
exitModal.guestWarning: As a guest, your progress will be lost when you exit.
exitModal.realisticWarning: Progress cannot be saved in real exam mode.
exitModal.saveOptionDesc: Saves your current progress and resume the exam whenever you want. Your time and answers will be preserved.
exitModal.exitOptionDesc: Abandon the exam and lose all current progress.
exitModal.exitRealisticDesc: Abandon the exam. Progress cannot be saved in real exam mode.
exitModal.realisticFullWarning: In real exam conditions you cannot pause or save. If you exit, you will lose all progress.
exitModal.guestFullWarning: To be able to save and continue exams later, you need to create an account. Without registration, your progress will be lost when you exit.

examHistory.startFirst: Start your first exam from the home page

failedStats.studyTipText: Failed questions are learning opportunities. Each mistake brings you closer to success. Review the explanations carefully and practice regularly to improve your understanding.
failedStats.analyzeWeaknesses: Analyze your weaknesses and turn them into strengths

questionReport.title: Report a problem
questionReport.subtitle: Help us improve the quality of the questions
questionReport.detailsPlaceholder: Describe the problem in more detail...
questionReport.successText: Thank you for helping us improve the quality of the question bank.
questionReport.loginRequired: You must be logged in to report problems

incorrect_answer.label: Incorrect answer
incorrect_answer.description: The answer marked as correct is wrong

outdated.label: Outdated information
outdated.description: The question or answer contains obsolete information

unclear.label: Confusing question
unclear.description: The statement is unclear or ambiguous

typo.label: Typo
typo.description: There are spelling or grammar errors

wrong_category.label: Wrong category
wrong_category.description: The question is in the wrong category

duplicate.label: Duplicate question
duplicate.description: This question already exists in the system

other.label: Other problem
other.description: Another type of problem not listed

questionReport.thanksText: Your report has been submitted successfully. Our team will review it soon.
questionReport.helpUs: Help us improve by reporting problems with the questions
questionReport.whatProblem: What type of problem did you find? *
questionReport.descriptionPlaceholder: Please explain what is wrong with this question...
questionReport.suggestedFix: Do you have a suggested fix? (optional)
questionReport.suggestedFixPlaceholder: If you know what the correct answer should be or how to improve the question...
questionReport.anonymousNote: You are reporting as an anonymous user.
questionReport.loginForUpdatesText: to receive updates about your report.
questionReport.descTooShort: Please provide a more detailed description (minimum 10 characters)
